statement: CoreWeave on-demand price for an NVIDIA GH200 instance (1 GPU) is $6.50 per instance-hour in North America; static level, no baseline stated.
why: Current rental price level for the Grace Hopper GH200 on a major neocloud; part of the datacenter GPU price overlay.

impact.mechanism: On-demand GH200 instance price level serves as a display overlay reference; no baseline stated, so no momentum inferred.

confidence.basis: Secondary open-web pricing page read on 2026-07-03.
